message:
feat(gateway): add graph visualization support to beads routes (bd-1hkv)

- Add BvGraphOptions, BvGraphNode, BvGraphEdge, BvGraphResult types to flywheel-clients
- Add getGraph method to BvClient supporting json/dot/mermaid formats
- Add getBvGraph service function with logging
- Add GET /beads/graph route with format, rootId, depth params
- Update all test mocks with getGraph method

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
